name: Sajor Bayam (Spinach-corn Puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach until tender.
2. Grind onion, garlic, and chili in a food processor.
3. Add shrimp paste and cook in a little vegetable oil until golden.
4. Combine with remaining ingredients except for coconut milk and puree in blender, adding coconut milk as necessary.
5. Reheat to serve.
